name: ESENT Process History
categoryDescription: Program execution evidence beyond the Uninstall/Amcache layer — BAM, SRUM, Syscache, and configuration affecting execution artifacts.
description: ESENT (Extensible Storage Engine) process registry artifacts — records process IDs and paths for applications using the ESENT database engine.
forensic_value: Applications using ESENT (Internet Explorer, Windows Mail, Active Directory, BITS, Windows Search, Windows Update) leave artifacts here. Unexpected ESENT process entries may indicate malware using ESE as a data store.
